chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 917 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.3531/2019 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.4029/2019 (151, CPC) 3. For hearing of main case 03.03.2020 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Ms. Amber Iqbal, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Ms. Rizwana Jabeen Siddiqui, counsel for the petitioner, and states that she is out of station. It is further informed that petitioner has expired and party is no more interested. In the view of above, petition has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
